svg.aria-label: OCS R300 Manufacturing Knowledge Object Map
svg.text: OCS R300 Manufacturing Knowledge Object Map
Navigation and synthesis objects over source-bound WI sub-knowledgebases and controlled-source authority
Knowledge Map fan-out opens the core synthesis notes. Query Guide routes to Source Inventory; Glossary/Ontology normalizes CTQ and risk terms on separate lanes.
E2E Process maps the eight source-bound WI sub-knowledgebases; controlled WI / PLM / MES records remain authoritative.
